---
id: queues-a-full-recalculation-of-the-users-data
title: "Queues a full recalculation of the user's data"
description: "Enqueues `Users::RecalculateDataJob`, which regenerates tracks, stats, visits, and digests in the background. Optionally scoped to a single year. A per-user lock prevents concurrent recalculations."
sidebar_label: "Queues a full recalculation of the user's data"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api/dawarich-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Queues a full recalculation of the user's data"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/recalculations"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Enqueues `Users::RecalculateDataJob`, which regenerates tracks, stats, visits, and digests in the background. Optionally scoped to a single year. A per-user lock prevents concurrent recalculations.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
